description: Created from bare go intent: tot bare go echt werkt
acceptance: Intent is implemented or explicitly blocked with evidence.

evidence.summary: Self-reflect follow-up resolved: bare go now has CLI subcommand, intent task creation, go-loop routing, budgeted handoff, skill no-command-spam mandate, and full green verification; checks: python3 cli/go.py validate ., make check, pytest -q 10 passed, git diff --check
